meaning_english: The killing of one's father.
The killing of one's mother.
The killing of one's brother.
The killing of one's sister.
The killing of one's wife.
The killing of an infant/baby.
The killing of a king.
The deliberate killing of a large group of people, especially an ethnic group.
The killing of one human being by another.
The practice of marrying only one person at a time.
The offense of marrying someone while already being legally married.
The practice of having more than one wife or husband at the same time.
The practice of a woman having more than one husband.
A person who hates marriage.
Abstinence from marriage and sexual relations, typically for religious reasons.
A person who walks in their sleep.
A person who talks in their sleep.
A person who never drinks alcohol.
A person who leads a strictly simple life and avoids all pleasures.
A person who is indifferent to pleasure or pain.
A person who takes particular pleasure in fine food and drink.
A connoisseur of good food.
A person who collects coins.
A person who collects postage stamps.
A critical judge of any art, particularly fine arts.

meaning_kannada: ಹಣಕ್ಕಾಗಿ ಕೆಲಸ ಮಾಡುವ ಸೈನಿಕ ಅಥವಾ ವ್ಯಕ್ತಿ
meaning_english: Primarily concerned with making money at the expense of ethics.
A student who stays away from school without permission.
Too powerful to be defeated or overcome.
A person or behavior that cannot be corrected or reformed.
Impossible to rectify or repair.
